# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change.

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Governance

## Testing

- [ ] Relevant tests pass
- [ ] Full test suite run when feasible
- [ ] Browser/screenshots checked if UI changed

## Documentation

- [ ] Forge Academy updated
- [ ] Task Guides updated if workflow changed
- [ ] Reference updated if concepts, roles, assets, or relationships changed
- [ ] Troubleshooting updated if setup, startup, permissions, or failure modes changed
- [ ] Architecture updated if architecture changed
- [ ] ADR updated if architecture decision changed
- [ ] RFC linked if this is a major feature
- [ ] Changelog or release notes updated when applicable

## Human Review And Security

- [ ] Human review principle preserved
- [ ] Audit or approval behavior documented when applicable
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private exercise data, or unsafe external calls added

## Definition Of Done

- [ ] Implementation complete
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Documentation complete
- [ ] Review-ready diff
